title: Lithocardium calophyllum
intro:
There is no information available on a plant called Lithocardium calophyllum. However, it is possible that the name is a misspelling or variation of Calophyllum inophyllum, a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific.

Calophyllum inophyllum, also known as the Calophyllum tree or Alexandrian laurel, is a tropical tree species that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae. The bioactive constituents of Calophyllum inophyllum include triterpenoids, flavonoids, and lignans, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
